nodes.label: AI for administrative tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable for sensitive or expert tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I use AI for multiple administrative tasks

nodes.label: AI as productivity enhancer
nodes.label_negative: AI as time-wasting due to inaccuracy
nodes.grounding_span: I am all about working smarter not harder

nodes.label: AI trustworthiness and verification
nodes.label_negative: AI unreliability for niche or sensitive topics
nodes.grounding_span: If the topic is not well known I feel like it becomes an extra step to verify

nodes.label: AI as enhancement tool not replacement
nodes.label_negative: AI as threat to human skills
nodes.grounding_span: I like to think of AI as my assistant, not my replacement

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: I am all about working smarter not harder

nodes.label: Professional integrity and ethical practice
nodes.grounding_span: I do not want the AI to editorialize or offer suggests

nodes.label: Work-life balance
nodes.grounding_span: I am not working as much outside my contracted hours

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as a helpful tool
nodes.grounding_span: When I am able to use AI to delegate certain tasks and finish all I need to it is very satisfying

nodes.label: Frustration with AI for niche problems
nodes.grounding_span: I have had to go back and research independently

nodes.label: Optimism about AI as future tool
nodes.grounding_span: I hope accuracy will continue to improve and also the natural language will improve

nodes.label: Task segmentation — separates simple repetitive tasks from complex judgment tasks
nodes.grounding_span: If I am communicating about highly sensitive or complicated information I generally do not want to input that into AI

nodes.label: Curiosity-driven exploration when at baseline performance
nodes.grounding_span: It was curiosity! I am all about working smarter not harder
